sourcesContent:
import { useState } from 'react'; import IMAGES from '../config/images'; import PRODUCTS from '../data/products'; import { TESTIMONIALS, CATEGORY_PILLS, MOSAIC_ITEMS, FEATURES } from '../data/static'; import ProductCard from '../components/ProductCard'; export default function HomePage({ navigate, onSelect }) { const tabKeys = [...new Set(PRODUCTS.map((p) => p.category))]; const [tab, setTab] = useState(tabKeys[0]); const tabProducts = PRODUCTS.filter((p) => p.category === tab).slice(0, 4); return ( <> {/* ── HERO ─────────────────────────────────────────── */}
Crafted & Trusted for Over 12 Years

Bring Life to Your Walls

Turn empty walls into beautiful focal points with a perfect blend of decor and nature. Explore our curated collection of handcrafted pieces.

{/* ── CATEGORY STRIP ───────────────────────────────── */}
{CATEGORY_PILLS.map((c) => ( ))}
{/* ── TABBED NEW ARRIVALS ───────────────────────────── */}
Just In

New Arrivals

{tabKeys.map((t) => ( ))}
{tabProducts.map((p) => ( ))}
{/* ── ROYAL FAMILY BANNER ──────────────────────────── */}

A Touch of
Royalty

Elevate your interiors with opulent designs that reflect heritage craftsmanship and refined style.

{/* ── KITCHEN MOSAIC ───────────────────────────────── */}
For Your Kitchen

Style Your Table, Every Day

{MOSAIC_ITEMS.map((m, i) => (
navigate('shop')}>
{m.label}
))}
{/* ── LIGHTING BANNER ──────────────────────────────── */}

Magical
Illumination

Create the perfect ambiance with lighting that adds warmth and style to every room.

{/* ── FEATURES STRIP ───────────────────────────────── */}
{FEATURES.map((f) => (
{f.icon}

{f.title}

{f.sub}

))}
{/* ── TESTIMONIALS ─────────────────────────────────── */}
1 Lakh+ Happy Patrons

Recognition & Acclaim

{TESTIMONIALS.map((t) => (

"{t.quote}"

— {t.author}
))}
{/* ── NEWSLETTER ───────────────────────────────────── */}

Join Our Inner Circle

Be first to discover new arrivals, exclusive offers, and decor inspiration.

); }
